items.title: Page updated: Hancock County Registry of Deeds

page_lines: The Registry of Deeds records all documents related to real property located in Hancock County. Recorded documents are available to the public, copies can be obtained in person at the Deeds office or on our website
. The Deeds office is also a Passport Acceptance Facility, we are able to generate new, renewal and replacement passports.
HANCOCK COUNTY REGISTRY OF DEEDS WEBSITE
The Registry of Deeds is a passport acceptance facility.
Passport services are available from 7:30am until 2:45pm.
As the Hancock County Registrar of Deeds, Julie Curtis’s term runs 01/01/2007 – 12/31/2026.
Governor’s Office of Policy Innovation and the Future
Southwest Harbor & Tremont Chamber of Commerce
Department of Secretary State Online Services
Official Website of Hancock County, Maine. © 2026 All rights reserved.
